courses.title: Pencil Sketching Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn the basics of pencil sketching including shading, proportions, and perspective.

courses.title: Charcoal Drawing Techniques
courses.description: Master charcoal drawing with techniques for contrast, texture, and expressive portraits.

courses.title: Canvas Painting for Beginners
courses.description: Start painting on canvas and learn color mixing, brush techniques, and composition.

courses.title: Watercolor Landscape Painting
courses.description: Create beautiful watercolor landscapes using blending and layering techniques.

courses.title: Acrylic Painting Essentials
courses.description: Learn acrylic painting techniques including textures, layering, and vibrant color use.

courses.title: Portrait Drawing Masterclass
courses.description: Learn how to draw realistic human portraits with accurate proportions and shading.

courses.title: Ink Illustration Techniques
courses.description: Explore ink illustration styles including line art, hatching, and comic illustration.

courses.title: Digital Art Basics
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of digital drawing using tablets and modern art software.

courses.title: Still Life Drawing
courses.description: Practice drawing everyday objects while mastering lighting, form, and composition.

courses.title: Mixed Media Art
courses.description: Combine different art materials like watercolor, ink, and collage to create unique artworks.
